requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer between the AI and the user during code generation tasks.

requirement: The system shall provide proactive suggestions that remind users of important implementation details they might otherwise overlook.

requirement: The system shall enable users to understand and internalize the knowledge transferred through explanations or code suggestions.
exact_text_quote: The customer fully understands and internalizes the knowledge shared by the partner. Knowledge transfer is complete and effective.

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer across multiple topic types including code structure, programming language syntax, bugs, and domain-specific knowledge.
exact_text_quote: we classify utterances using topic types based on the classes established by Kuttal et al. [7] . Although this list of classes cannot be exhaustive, it provides a structured overview of common topics discussed in knowledge transfer episodes.

requirement: The system shall minimize user distraction during knowledge transfer interactions.
exact_text_quote: GITHUB COPILOT promotes more focused interactions—though users tend to trust its suggestions more readily, raising questions about critical engagement.

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer related to programming language syntax and semantics.
exact_text_quote: PROGRAM Knowledge about the programming language itself or it’s syntax.

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer related to debugging and error identification.
exact_text_quote: BUG An error in the code.

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer related to code implementation and structure.
exact_text_quote: CODE The code itself; i.e., what they are programming

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer related to domain-specific tasks and context.
exact_text_quote: DOMAIN The task (in case of [ 7]: implement tic-tac-toe game)

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer related to development tools and IDE usage.
exact_text_quote: TOOL Knowledge about the IDE or how to use the tool.

requirement: The system shall encourage users to critically evaluate suggestions rather than accepting them without scrutiny.

requirement: The system shall enable users to build new knowledge by trying to understand the code presented by the AI assistant.
exact_text_quote: This form of knowledge transfer was named a "co-production" by Zieris and Prechelt [6] . Originally, for human–human pair programming, this defines episodes where the programmers work together on building new knowledge (e.g., discovering a bug and its cause) [ 6].

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer through code co-production where users create code with AI assistance and verify its correctness.
exact_text_quote: this often included episodes in the human–AI pair programming setting where a programmer creates code with the help of the assistant and verifies (verbally) that the code actually fulfills its purpose.

requirement: The system shall provide knowledge transfer that is focused on the immediate task while reducing unrelated topic shifts.

requirement: The system shall support knowledge transfer through push mode where the AI proactively shares information the user might need.

exact_text_quote: Unit testing is a monotonous process. It would be great if AI can auto generate these cases.

requirement: The system shall provide real-time code review feedback prior to human peer review.

requirement: The system shall assist with boilerplate code generation and framework scaffolding.
exact_text_quote: It's fantastic for boilerplate, or roughly sketching out a framework.

requirement: The system shall help developers interact with unfamiliar APIs by providing usage guidance without requiring manual documentation search.

requirement: The system shall support voice-based interaction for describing desired code functionality.

requirement: The system shall avoid introducing bias by ensuring diverse data representation in training and implementing fairness metrics.

requirement: The system shall demonstrate consistent and reliable performance over time to build developer trust.

requirement: The system shall capture fine-grained interaction data including code edits, executions, errors, and chat messages to enable context-aware AI support.

requirement: The system shall enrich LLM prompts with real-time context including recent code, errors, objectives, and chat history to improve response relevance.

requirement: The system shall be capable of performing coding operations including reading uploaded files, extracting statistical information from CSV tables, and generating images with existing libraries.

requirement: The system shall automatically apply valid data analysis approaches and explain and argue the results back to the user.

requirement: The system shall consider the size of suggested code blocks, as larger blocks may be perceived as more invasive.
exact_text_quote: the size of suggested code blocks and the availability of alternative suggestions, which affect the ability of developers to choose the most fitting suggestion for their code

requirement: The system shall help developers reduce key-strokes through autocomplete functionality.
exact_text_quote: 86%, 76%, and 68% of participants cited an important motivation for using these tools was autocompletion (M1), finishing tasks faster (M2), and skipping going online to recall syntax respectively (M3)

requirement: The system shall help developers finish programming tasks more quickly.
exact_text_quote: 86%, 76%, and 68% of participants cited an important motivation for using these tools was autocompletion (M1), finishing tasks faster (M2), and skipping going online to recall syntax respectively (M3)

requirement: The system shall help developers recall syntax, code snippets, and API calls without needing to go online.
exact_text_quote: 86%, 76%, and 68% of participants cited an important motivation for using these tools was autocompletion (M1), finishing tasks faster (M2), and skipping going online to recall syntax respectively (M3)

requirement: The system shall generate code that meets functional requirements specified by the developer.
exact_text_quote: Code generation tools write code that doesn't meet functional or non-functional (e.g., security, performance) requirements that I need.

requirement: The system shall generate code that meets non-functional requirements including security and performance.
exact_text_quote: Code generation tools write code that doesn't meet functional or non-functional (e.g., security, performance) requirements that I need.

requirement: The system shall be controllable by developers to generate the desired output.
exact_text_quote: It's hard to control code generation tools to get code that I want.

requirement: The system shall generate repetitive code such as boilerplate and CRUD endpoints.
exact_text_quote: Participants were successful in using the AI programming assistants to generate repetitive code, such as 'boilerplate [code]' (P165), 'repetitive endpoints for crud' (P164), and 'college assignments' (P265) that had repeated functionality or were common programming tasks.

requirement: The system shall generate code with simple logic such as utility functions and sorting algorithms.
exact_text_quote: Consistent with prior work [56], participants reported using AI programming assistants to successfully generate code with simple logic. This was the second most mentioned code in the dataset. Examples include 'small independent utils functions' (P155), 'sorting algorithms' (P177), and 'small functions like storing the training model into local file systems' (P255).

requirement: The system shall support autocomplete for short code completions.
exact_text_quote: We found participants also utilized AI programming assistants to do short autocompletions of code, which is associated most with acceleration mode usages of these tools [12].

requirement: The system shall assist with quality assurance by generating test cases.
exact_text_quote: Participants reported using AI programming assistants for quality assurance, such as '[generating] useful log messages' (P212) and '[producing] a lot of test cases quickly' (P356).

requirement: The system shall help with brainstorming and generating proof-of-concept implementations.
exact_text_quote: Similar to prior work [12, 56, 60], participants mentioned that using AI programming assistants helped with brainstorming or building proof-of-concepts by helping generate multiple implementations for a given problem.

requirement: The system shall help developers learn new programming languages and libraries.
exact_text_quote: Study participants also utilized these tools when 'learning new programming languages' (P197) or 'new libraries' (P140) they had limited to no experience with, rather than using online documentation [47] or video tutorials [40].

requirement: The system shall generate documentation for code.
exact_text_quote: A few participants used AI programming assistants to generate documentation. One participant noted generating documentation helped with collaboration: I mainly use it to...annotate my code for my colleagues.' (P258)

requirement: The system shall maintain consistency with project coding style.
exact_text_quote: A few participants used these tools to improve style consistency in a codebase, which is a factor developers consider while making implementation decisions [36].

requirement: The system shall provide clear explanations of what inputs cause what outputs.
exact_text_quote: The biggest challenges participants reported facing were not knowing what part of the input influenced the output (S1), giving up on using outputted code (S2), and having trouble controlling the model (S3), as 30%, 28%, and 26% of participants encountered these situations often.

requirement: The system shall allow users to provide feedback to correct or personalize the model.
exact_text_quote: Most frequently, participants wanted to provide feedback to the AI programming assistant for it to learn from. Some wanted to correct the outputted code as feedback, while others wanted to teach the model their personal coding style.

requirement: The system shall have a better understanding of code context including APIs and programming languages.
exact_text_quote: Participants also reported wanting AI programming assistants to have additional understanding of code context, such as learning from 'context from other files on the same workspace' (P12).

requirement: The system shall support natural language interactions for code refinement.
exact_text_quote: Some participants wanted opportunities for interaction via natural language. Inspired by ChatGPT [1], several participants mentioned chat-based interactions: 'would be nice if we could give feedback to it like how we chat with chatGPT' (P39).

requirement: The system shall generate code that addresses non-functional requirements including time complexity and readability.
exact_text_quote: Some participants requested AI programming assistants to generate code that addressed non-functional requirements, such as 'time complexity' (P191). Other participants wanted more readable code: Sometimes AI suggest code [with] one lines or short hand logic, which is difficult to read and understand.' (P98)

requirement: The system shall minimize cognitive effort and avoid distracting developers during programming.
exact_text_quote: designing minimal cognitive effort interactions with these tools to reduce distractions for users while they are programming.

requirement: The system shall generate code that performs the intended action correctly.
exact_text_quote: The two major reasons were that the generated code did not perform the intended action (S22) and because the code did not meet functional or non-functional requirements (S23)–43% and 34% of participants frequently encountered these situations respectively.

requirement: The system shall generate code that matches the project's coding style.
exact_text_quote: The generated code's style doesn't match my project's.

requirement: The system shall minimize defects in generated code.
exact_text_quote: The generated code contains too many defects.

requirement: The system shall generate code that uses familiar APIs or provide explanations for unfamiliar ones.
exact_text_quote: 25% of participants said it was often because the outputted code used unfamiliar APIs (S10). Meanwhile, 23% and 19% of participants stated it was often due to the code being too long to read quickly (S11) and the code having too many control structures (S12) respectively.

requirement: The system shall support generation of boilerplate code artifacts such as template classes with placeholder methods for data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: A boilerplate artifact is often a template code such as a class implementing an empty interface with placeholder methods.

requirement: The system shall support generation of nearly-complete artifacts suitable for direct integration or minimal refinement in data analysis workflows.
exact_text_quote: An example of nearly-complete artifact, to be generated by the AI, is an SQL query that joins multiple tables to generate a report.

requirement: The system shall enable human inspection of generated artifacts through manual review or tool-assisted static analysis.
exact_text_quote: The AI produces a draft artifact, which then undergoes human inspection—this can be manual or tool-assisted, e.g., using static analysis or review tools like Sonar AI Code Assurance.

requirement: The system shall support iterative refinement through prompt revision when generated outputs do not meet quality expectations.
exact_text_quote: If not, the engineer either edits it manually, revises the prompt for regeneration, or abandons the AI artifact, and proceeds with developing the artifact manually.

requirement: The system shall provide fallback to manual development when AI-generated outputs are unsatisfactory after refinement attempts.
exact_text_quote: If not, the engineer either edits it manually, revises the prompt for regeneration, or abandons the AI artifact, and proceeds with developing the artifact manually.

requirement: The system shall support a divide-and-conquer approach by decomposing complex data analysis tasks into smaller, manageable sub-tasks.
exact_text_quote: Decompose the problem: The engineer breaks down the large task into smaller, manageable sub-tasks that are digestible by AI tools.

requirement: The system shall support validation and refinement of sub-outputs generated for individual components of data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: Validate and refine sub-outputs: After obtaining AI-generated outputs for each part, the engineer carefully inspects and improves them if needed—either manually or through additional prompts.

requirement: The system shall enable integration and synthesis of validated sub-components into cohesive data analysis solutions.
exact_text_quote: Integrate and synthesize: The validated pieces are then thoughtfully combined into a cohesive solution.

requirement: The system shall provide quality indicators that include correctness, completeness, maintainability, and fitness for use of generated artifacts.
exact_text_quote: Quality here includes correctness, completeness, maintainability, and fitness for use.

requirement: The system shall provide effort saved metrics comparing AI-generated artifact creation to manual development effort.
exact_text_quote: Effort saved by using the AI-generated artifact compared to manual creation – Also ranges from low to high. This accounts for time, cognitive load, and reduced manual effort.

requirement: The system shall support developer awareness of quality risks associated with AI-generated outputs through decision guidance.
exact_text_quote: The decision framework helps developers recognize when an AI-generated artifact—while effort-saving—may introduce maintainability issues or latent defects.

requirement: The system shall account for task complexity when providing AI assistance, recognizing limitations for complex logic, deep contextual dependencies, or architectural nuances.
exact_text_quote: However, above this threshold—when tasks involve complex logic, deep contextual dependencies, or architectural nuances—AI often struggles to deliver acceptable outputs.

requirement: The system shall support disengagement and fallback to manual development after repeated unsatisfactory outputs.
exact_text_quote: Our observations suggest that engineers would disengage from AI tools once they encounter repeated unsatisfactory results. Even after refining prompts or adjusting inputs, if the outputs remain flawed or unhelpful, engineers revert to manual development.

requirement: The system shall engage in conversation with the human developer to help clarify their intents before synthesizing code.
exact_text_quote: The AI teammate engages in a conversation with the human developer to help them clarify their intents. Once intents are clarified, the AI teammate synthesizes them into runnable software.

requirement: The system shall synthesize intents into runnable software through an efficient search process.
exact_text_quote: Compiler.next is the piece of software responsible for synthesizing intents (possibly enriched with examples and data as shown in Figure 4) into runnable software via an efficient search process.

requirement: The system shall provide explanations of coding choices, design principles, and framework functionality to users.
exact_text_quote: At any moment, the human developer has the option to ask the AI teammate to explain the rationale and trade-offs behind its coding choices, the design principles and patterns that were used, and even how certain frameworks and libraries work.

requirement: The system shall support iterative development where users react to prototyped software in each code cycle.
exact_text_quote: The development model in SE 3.0 is inherently iterative and cyclic, where humans react to the prototyped software in every code cycle.

requirement: The system shall translate intents into tests and adapt tests as requirements change.
exact_text_quote: Another key attribute of Compiler.next is its goal-tracking mechanism. This mechanism ensures that (i) intents are translated into tests, (ii) tests are adequately adapted as requirements change, and (iii) tests will eventually pass.

requirement: The system shall learn from prior interactions with the human to infer missing intent details and avoid repeated clarifications.
exact_text_quote: Similarly, an AI teammate should learn from prior interactions with humans, such that intent details can be omitted, recurrent themes do not require repeated clarifications, and missing information can be inferred.

requirement: The system shall balance multiple competing objectives including accuracy, latency, and cost during code synthesis.
exact_text_quote: A key attribute of the code synthesizer is its ability to find the best trade-off between multiple competing objectives, such as accuracy (how well it fulfills the intent), latency (e.g., number of requests sent to the FM), and cost (e.g., number of input tokens in the prompt and expected number of output tokens).

requirement: The system shall use knowledge-driven models with curriculum engineering to enhance reasoning capabilities.
exact_text_quote: SE 3.0 employs a more efficient knowledge-driven approach to training that leverages curriculum engineering to enhance the reasoning capabilities and flexibility of models.

requirement: The system shall provide low-latency responses for daily use by routing simpler requests to smaller, more efficient models.
exact_text_quote: To ensure AI teammates are effective for daily use, they must offer low-latency responses and be cost-effective.

requirement: The system shall leverage past search data to guide future code synthesis processes and improve efficiency.
exact_text_quote: Instead of initiating every search from scratch, we propose using past search data (both from local and crowdsourced runs) to guide future search processes. By caching previous search outcomes, the synthesizer can reuse and build on prior knowledge, reducing redundant computations and allowing it to start searches closer to optimal solutions.

requirement: The system shall analyze coding patterns and generate contextually appropriate code snippets based on user specifications and implementation context.
exact_text_quote: Copilot can analyze coding patterns and generate contextually appropriate code snippets, reducing the time spent on repetitive implementation tasks.

requirement: The system shall generate function and method documentation based on implementation code.
exact_text_quote: AI assistants can significantly improve documentation efforts by generating function and method documentation based on implementation, creating API specifications from existing code, summarizing code changes for more meaningful commit messages, and explaining complex code segments for knowledge sharing.

requirement: The system shall analyze code to generate test cases that target critical execution paths, boundary conditions, and edge cases.
exact_text_quote: AI tools can analyze code to generate test cases that target critical execution paths, focus on boundary conditions and edge cases, increase code coverage metrics, and simulate various input combinations.

requirement: The system shall identify patterns in code that might benefit from refactoring, including duplicate code segments, performance bottlenecks, and opportunities for more efficient data structures.
exact_text_quote: AI tools excel at identifying patterns in code that might benefit from refactoring. They can detect duplicate code segments that can be consolidated, identify performance bottlenecks in complex algorithms, suggest more efficient data structures for specific operations, and recommend architectural improvements for better maintainability.

requirement: The system shall identify potential security vulnerabilities in code, detect problematic dependency versions with known CVEs, and recommend secure coding patterns.
exact_text_quote: AI-powered static analysis tools can identify potential security vulnerabilities like SQL injection or XSS, detect problematic dependency versions with known CVEs, recommend secure coding patterns, and enforce compliance with security standards.

requirement: The system shall simulate realistic load conditions based on patterns and identify performance regression points and optimization strategies.
exact_text_quote: Machine learning models can simulate realistic load conditions based on production patterns, identify performance regression points, suggest optimization strategies for bottlenecks, and predict scaling issues before they impact production.

requirement: The system shall achieve high correctness rates for generated code, with at least 83.7% correctness for straightforward tasks and 71.2% for complex algorithmic challenges.
exact_text_quote: Comprehensive evaluations of AI-generated code have revealed that modern AI assistants achieve correctness rates of 83.7% for straightforward implementation tasks and 71.2% for more complex algorithmic challenges, representing a dramatic improvement over earlier generations of code completion tools.

requirement: The system shall produce documentation that achieves high alignment with expert-created documentation while requiring significantly less time investment.
exact_text_quote: Studies examining documentation quality have found that AI-generated technical documentation achieves 78.3% alignment with expert-created documentation while requiring only 23% of the time investment, effectively addressing one of the most persistent challenges in software development lifecycle management.

requirement: The system shall generate test cases that achieve 15-20% higher branch coverage than manually created tests and identify more boundary condition failures.
exact_text_quote: Studies examining the effectiveness of AI-generated test suites have found they consistently achieve between 15-20% higher branch coverage than manually created tests for equivalent systems, with particularly significant improvements in complex conditional logic where human testers often miss subtle combinations.

requirement: The system shall reduce false positives in security analysis while increasing true positive detection compared to traditional static analysis approaches.
exact_text_quote: Research comparing AI-enhanced security analysis against traditional SAST tools found an average reduction in false positives of 29.4% while simultaneously increasing true positive detection by 22.7%, fundamentally improving the signal-to-noise ratio that has historically undermined developer confidence in automated security tooling.

requirement: The system shall enable engineers to focus on higher-order thinking including architectural design, complex problem decomposition, and technical risk assessment.
exact_text_quote: As AI handles more routine coding tasks, engineers can focus on higher-order thinking including architectural design decisions that align with business strategy, complex problem decomposition and solution evaluation, cross-functional collaboration and requirement refinement, and technical risk assessment and mitigation.

requirement: The system shall require engineers to validate generated code against business requirements, ensure proper error handling and edge case coverage, and verify alignment with architectural patterns and team standards.
exact_text_quote: However, engineers must maintain critical oversight by validating generated code against business requirements, ensuring proper error handling and edge case coverage, and verifying alignment with architectural patterns and team standards.

requirement: The system shall be integrated through a structured approach that includes clear guidelines for appropriate use cases, systematic validation processes, and intentional knowledge sharing.
exact_text_quote: Experimental implementations in enterprise environments have revealed that teams adopting structured approaches to AI tool usage —including clear guidelines for appropriate use cases, systematic validation processes, and intentional knowledge sharing—achieved significantly higher satisfaction rates (82% versus 53%) and more consistent quality outcomes than those employing ad-hoc adoption strategies.

requirement: The system shall be adopted through an experimental approach starting with low-risk components and establishing clear evaluation criteria before broader deployment.
exact_text_quote: Teams should adopt an experimental mindset when incorporating AI tools, starting with low-risk, non-critical components, establishing clear evaluation criteria for AI-assisted development, measuring productivity impacts and quality metrics, and gradually expanding AI usage based on demonstrated success.

requirement: The system shall generate contextually appropriate code for domain-specific frameworks and APIs based on specialized knowledge of development patterns.
exact_text_quote: Copilot demonstrates particularly strong capabilities when working with Office 365 -specific frameworks and APIs. The system leverages specialized knowledge of Microsoft's development patterns to generate contextually appropriate code for SharePoint, Teams, and Exchange applications.

requirement: The system shall implement template-based code suggestions enhanced with contextual awareness to adapt standard patterns to specific project requirements.
exact_text_quote: The code generation engine implements template -based suggestions enhanced with contextual awareness, allowing it to adapt standard patterns to specific project requirements.

requirement: The system shall maintain contextual understanding across multiple files within the same solution through incremental context building.
exact_text_quote: The architecture also implements incremental context building, allowing Copilot to construct a comprehensive understanding of the codebase through progressive exploration rather than attempting to process the entire solution at once.

requirement: The system shall adapt recommendations based on user feedback through adaptive learning capabilities within development sessions.
exact_text_quote: The system demonstrates adaptive learning capabilities, where repeated rejection of certain suggestion types leads to refined recommendations over time within the same development session.

requirement: The system shall provide higher acceptance rates for structural code components compared to business logic implementations.
exact_text_quote: Studies reveal that Copilot's suggestions achieve higher acceptance rates for structural code components compared to business logic implementations, where developers still prefer to maintain direct control.

requirement: The system shall function as an accelerated learning tool by providing greatest benefits during exploration of new technologies or APIs.
exact_text_quote: Long-term productivity analysis suggests that the greatest benefits occur during the exploration phase of new technologies or APIs, with diminishing returns as developers gain familiarity with specific frameworks. This indicates that Copilot functions effectively as an accelerated learning tool in addition to its code generation capabilities.

requirement: The system shall generate appropriate error handling patterns specific to the target domain's response structures.
exact_text_quote: The case study highlighted Copilot's strength in generating appropriate error handling patterns specific to SharePoint's response structures, an area where developers typically spend considerable implementation time.

requirement: The system shall encapsulate security best practices in generated code to reduce security vulnerabilities.
exact_text_quote: Performance analysis within the case study revealed that Copilot -assisted implementations showed fewer security vulnerabilities related to authentication handling compared to manually coded equivalents, suggesting that the system effectively encapsulates security best practices in its generated code.

requirement: The system shall maintain IDE responsiveness during complex suggestion generation through asynchronous processing.
exact_text_quote: The integration layer between Visual Studio and Copilot creates a bidirectional communication channel that preserves IDE responsiveness even during complex suggestion generation. This is achieved through an asynchronous processing queue that prevents UI thread blocking.

requirement: The system shall reduce implementation time for standard tasks and boilerplate code patterns.
exact_text_quote: Research indicates that junior developers experience the most substantial productivity gains, with measured reductions in implementation time for standard tasks.

requirement: The system shall reduce code defect rates particularly for routine implementation patterns.
exact_text_quote: Research tracking defect introduction rates shows that code produced through AI assistance exhibits fewer initial defects compared to manually written code, particularly for routine implementation patterns.

requirement: The system shall provide explanations for AI suggestions to support developer understanding and decision-making.
exact_text_quote: Emerging approaches implement explainability mechanisms that help developers understand the rationale behind AI suggestions, ownership attribution for generated code, and configurable guardrails that align with organizational policies.

requirement: The system shall reduce code completion time for data analysis tasks compared to manual development without AI assistance.
exact_text_quote: using an AI assistant yielded a 30.7% median reduction in completion time

requirement: The system shall provide greater productivity gains for habitual users who regularly use AI assistance while programming.
exact_text_quote: habitual AI users showed an estimated 55.9% speedup

requirement: The system shall maintain code quality comparable to manually written code to ensure downstream maintainability.
exact_text_quote: we did not detect systematic maintainability advantages or disadvantages when other developers evolved code co-developed with AI assistants

requirement: The system shall monitor and mitigate code bloat risks from excessive code generation.
exact_text_quote: Future work should examine risks such as code bloat from excessive code generation

requirement: The system shall support developer learning and understanding to prevent cognitive debt from over-reliance on AI assistance.
exact_text_quote: cognitive debt as developers offload more mental effort to assistants

requirement: The system shall generate code with high CodeHealth scores (low code smells) to support long-term maintainability.
exact_text_quote: CodeHealth correlates with increased maintenance costs and defect risks, as well as slower onboarding

requirement: The system shall support code comprehension and onboarding for developers unfamiliar with the codebase.
exact_text_quote: AI assistants can also be helpful for onboarding and understanding new code

requirement: The system shall produce code that facilitates subsequent manual evolution by other developers.
exact_text_quote: maintainable code should be easy to reason about and modify by someone other than the original author

requirement: The system shall generate code that adheres to repository standards and requires minimal rework before integration.
exact_text_quote: Code written after the adoption of AI requires more rework to satisfy repository standards, indicating a potential increase in technical debt.

requirement: The system shall provide explanations of generated code to help users understand the underlying design rationale and integration implications.
exact_text_quote: AI tools enable broader participation but may also encourage developers to rely on generated solutions without fully understanding the underlying design rationale and potential integration issues

requirement: The system shall prioritize code maintainability over rapid code generation to reduce long-term technical debt.
exact_text_quote: Such reliance increases the likelihood of quick fixes that favor short-term functionality over long-term maintainability

requirement: The system shall support experienced developers in reviewing and integrating AI-generated contributions efficiently.
exact_text_quote: the added rework burden falls on the more experienced (core) developers, who review 6.5% more code after Copilot's introduction, but show a 19% drop in their original code productivity

requirement: The system shall balance productivity gains with quality assurance to prevent shifting maintenance burden to expert users.
exact_text_quote: the results highlight a fundamental tension in AI-assisted software development between short-term productivity gains and long-term system sustainability

requirement: The system shall enable less experienced users to contribute code while ensuring contributions meet project quality standards.
exact_text_quote: peripheral contributors, particularly those in the bottom percentiles in terms of their previous contributions, increased their commit activity by 43.5% and submitted 17.7% more PRs

requirement: The system shall be goal-driven and operate at a higher abstraction level than task-driven code completion systems.
exact_text_quote: AI pair programmers must be goal-driven (as opposed to task-driven)

requirement: The system shall be SE-aware and capable of reasoning about architecture trade-offs, design choices, and complex code changes including refactoring.
exact_text_quote: they must be able to reason about architecture trade-offs and design choices, as well as perform complex code changes that are not necessarily additive (e.g., refactoring)

requirement: The system shall act as a human partner rather than a replacer, engaging in collaborative pair programming interactions.
exact_text_quote: humans and AI collaborate as partners

requirement: The system shall be a self-learner that learns from feedback and autonomously acquires contextual information and human preferences over time.
exact_text_quote: AI pair programmers should also autonomously learn recurrent contextual information (e.g., project constraints regarding license usage) and human preferences (e.g., regarding coding style) to streamline communication

requirement: The system shall engage in iterative, conversation-driven development processes with back-and-forth dialogue.
exact_text_quote: These AI partners engage in iterative, conversation-driven development processes

requirement: The system shall have conversational intelligence including proactivity and communicability to interact naturally with users.
exact_text_quote: the AI should exhibit adequate social traits, such as conversational intelligence (e.g., proactivity and communicability)

requirement: The system shall ask clarifying questions to refine user goals and address inherent human communication limitations.
exact_text_quote: the AI must also ask humans for clarification when needed

requirement: The system shall track progress toward goals and evaluate achievement of objectives.
exact_text_quote: The AI keeps track of the goal, refines it together with the human if necessary, and constantly evaluates progress toward that goal

requirement: The system shall provide signals indicating confidence levels in its responses to help users judge understanding.
exact_text_quote: humans also need signals from the agents (e.g., confidence scores) to be able to judge whether those agents understood the communicated goal

requirement: The system shall understand natural language inquiries without requiring users to craft specialized prompts.
exact_text_quote: developers should not have to worry about phrasing their inquiries as prompts that must be crafted using an unnatural lingo

requirement: The system shall understand, write, and refactor code with deep understanding of programming logic, testing, and relevant technologies.
exact_text_quote: This agent understands, writes, and refactors code. It is the doer in EDD. This agent has a deep understanding of programming logic and testing, as well as technologies (target programming language, frameworks, and libraries)

requirement: The system shall be capable of reasoning about its own code and producing repairs to reduce the need for human intervention.
exact_text_quote: It is also capable of reasoning about its own code and producing associated repairs, ultimately reducing the need for human intervention

requirement: The system shall leverage code-specific language models that capture code semantics better than general-purpose models.
exact_text_quote: AI Pair Programmers should leverage Large Language Models for code (a.k.a., code LLMs). These models are specifically trained with source code, aiming to better capture code semantics compared to generalist LLMs

requirement: The system shall use smaller, more cost-effective code models while maintaining performance through proper training data curation.
exact_text_quote: curating the training data (e.g., selecting high quality sources, adhering to licenses) and applying careful preprocessing can generate significantly smaller models with a performance that rivals that of much bigger models

requirement: The system shall provide mentoring capabilities to support human skill development through explanations and technical guidance.
exact_text_quote: an AI pair programmer should not only code like a senior human engineer (or even better!), but also mentor like one

requirement: The system shall offer personalized technical mentoring based on learned human preferences and prior interactions.
exact_text_quote: we foresee great research opportunities in the design of AI pair programmers that (i) learn and reason from their prior interactions with humans, (ii) offer personalized technical mentoring to those humans

requirement: The system shall provide high system/output quality including accurate, reliable outputs that match users' work style and practices to foster trust.
exact_text_quote: System/Output quality encompasses genAI tools' presentation, adherence to safe and secure practices (including privacy and security implications of using genAI), and its performance and output quality (consistency and correctness) in relation to the development style or work environment in which it is utilized

requirement: The system shall deliver functional value through educational benefits and practical advantages to build user trust.
exact_text_quote: Functional value of a tool refers to the practical benefits and utility it offers users in their work. In our context, genAI's functional value encompasses its educational value and clear advantages relative to work performance

requirement: The system shall maintain alignment with users' immediate goals to cultivate trust.
exact_text_quote: Goal maintenance is related to the degree to which genAI's actions and responses align with the developer's ongoing goals

requirement: The system shall support users with varying levels of computer self-efficacy to influence their intentions to use the system.
exact_text_quote: Computer self-efficacy refers to an individual's belief in their ability to engage with and use new technologies to succeed in tasks. It shapes how individuals apply cognitive strategies and the effort and persistence they invest in using new technologies, thereby influencing their intention to use them

requirement: The system shall support users with different risk tolerances to accommodate diverse adoption tendencies.
exact_text_quote: Risk-tolerant individuals (one end of the spectrum) are more inclined to experiment with unproven technology than risk-averse ones (the other end), and show higher intentions to use new tools

requirement: The system shall provide contextual transparency by communicating its capabilities, limitations, and reasoning process to help users calibrate appropriate trust.
exact_text_quote: Creating this alignment involves designing interfaces that explicitly communicate the tool's capabilities and limitations, consistent with HAI interaction guidelines. This clarity allows individuals to form accurate expectations about system quality within their task contexts and assess its functional value, thereby fostering appropriate trust

requirement: The system shall support diverse cognitive styles including varying motivations, information processing styles, and learning approaches to ensure inclusive user experience.
exact_text_quote: User experience in Human-AI interaction (HAI-UX) can be improved by supporting diverse cognitive styles, which refer to the ways users perceive, process, and interact with information and technology, as well as their approach to problem-solving

requirement: The system shall adapt to users' goals by accounting for their current state, immediate goals, expected outcomes, and preferences for transitioning between states.
exact_text_quote: To achieve goal maintenance, the AI should consistently account for the developer's (1) current state; (2) immediate goals, and the expected success (outcomes from AI); as well as (3) preferences for transitioning from their current state (1) to achieving their immediate goals (2)

requirement: The system shall allow users to request help rather than receiving unsolicited code suggestions, enabling them to attempt problems independently before seeking assistance.
exact_text_quote: Novices who are learning to program may benefit from being able to attempt problems initially on their own and request help when needed, rather than having to ignore suggestions when they are not wanted.

requirement: The system shall provide shorter code suggestions to reduce cognitive load on users, as longer suggestions require more time to decipher and are more likely to be deleted.
exact_text_quote: The utility of shorter suggestions was able to be determined more rapidly than longer suggestions by participants, and short suggestions that were accepted were less likely to be changed or deleted.

requirement: The system shall provide scaffolding to support metacognition by helping users understand their problem-solving progress and identify when they are stuck.
exact_text_quote: Some participants in our study used Copilot to move past metacognitive difficulties by 'rubber ducking,' but this seems to be an uncommon behavior that could be better supported through the interface itself.

requirement: The system shall include explainable AI features that help users understand what the system is doing and how it generates suggestions, building accurate mental models of system behavior.
exact_text_quote: There is a need for systems like Copilot to help the user understand what it's doing and this could be especially effective for novice programmers.

requirement: The system shall provide mechanisms to address licensing and attribution issues by indicating when generated code matches existing source code from training data.
exact_text_quote: AI code generators can be designed to address this problem by better signaling to users when generated code matches an existing source, or hiding suggestions that may not meet a user-defined criteria around license use.

requirement: The system shall allow users to cycle through multiple code suggestions at a given point to encourage exploration of alternative approaches.
exact_text_quote: Copilot is already capable of obtaining multiple suggestions per input prompt, however, it can benefit from explicit, discoverable UI that states how many suggestions are available at a given point.

requirement: The system shall minimize cognitive load by avoiding constant interruptions with code suggestions that disrupt user problem-solving focus.
exact_text_quote: The constant stream of suggested code was also distracting, since most participants would stop what they were doing and attempt to decipher the suggested code once it appeared.

requirement: The system shall provide feedback on where to go next in problem-solving rather than only providing implementation-level code suggestions.
exact_text_quote: Copilot mainly gives students feedback on 'Where to next?'

requirement: The system shall generate syntactically correct code to help users avoid syntax errors, which are particularly challenging for novice programmers.
exact_text_quote: Copilot tends to generate syntactically-correct suggestions, and thus may be particularly helpful in assisting students to avoid syntax errors.

requirement: The system shall support users in understanding generated code by providing explanations that help them learn from the suggestions.
exact_text_quote: Participants commented positively on the guidance that Copilot provided them. Such comments often referred to higher level direction setting and problem solving.

requirement: The system shall provide confidence values or visualizations indicating the reliability of its suggestions to help users assess whether to accept them.
exact_text_quote: we recommend that systems like Copilot should help users see a little bit into the black box, such as what it is using as input, a confidence value (or visualization), and its own estimation of the skill level of the user.

requirement: The system shall allow users to adjust the verbosity and length of code suggestions based on their skill level and preferences.
exact_text_quote: There is scope to make use of a wealth of contextual information—such as the type of problems being solved and knowledge about the background of the user—to adjust how and when the code suggestions are made.

requirement: The system shall provide intelligent code suggestions and autocompletions within integrated development environments to increase developer productivity.
exact_text_quote: It aims to increase the productivity of software developers by offering intelligent code suggestions and autocompletions within integrated development environments.

requirement: The system shall analyze code context and produce pertinent code snippets, comments, and documentation as developers write code or plain text comments.
exact_text_quote: As developers write software code or plain text comments, Copilot analyzes the code context and produces pertinent code snippets, comments, and documentation.

requirement: The system shall integrate into existing development workflows.
exact_text_quote: they must be integrated into existing development workflows

requirement: The system shall support multiple programming languages and frameworks by learning from real-world coding practices.
exact_text_quote: This extensive dataset allowed the AI model to learn from real-world coding practices, patterns, and styles across various programming languages and frameworks.

requirement: The system shall improve developer productivity as measured by output quantity.
exact_text_quote: Our preliminary results provide suggestive evidence that developers at both companies became more productive after adopting Copilot, completing 12.92% to 21.83% more pull requests per week at Microsoft and 7.51% to 8.69% at Accenture

requirement: The system shall integrate with Jupyter notebooks to suggest analytical next steps and facilitate iterative development for data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: systems integrated into Jupyter notebooks... that assist data scientists by suggesting analytical next steps, facilitating iterative development, and reducing cognitive load during complex data-analysis tasks

requirement: The system shall provide transparent explanations and uncertainty indicators for code suggestions to help users build accurate mental models of tool capabilities.
exact_text_quote: Transparent explanations, uncertainty indicators, and clearly communicated limitations help users build accurate mental models of tool capabilities and prevent over-reliance or under-utilization

requirement: The system shall provide integrated verification features including auto-generated tests and security scans to give users continuous oversight.
exact_text_quote: Integrated verification features, such as auto-generated tests or security scans, and easily reversible overrides give developers continuous oversight and help ensure high-quality code outcomes

requirement: The system shall combine inline code suggestions with interactive chat-based explanations to support diverse coding scenarios and user preferences.
exact_text_quote: Combining inline suggestions with interactive chat-based explanations provides flexible interaction modalities that support diverse coding scenarios and user preferences

requirement: The system shall reduce cognitive load through seamless integration into existing workflows and context-aware suggestions.
exact_text_quote: Tools should reduce cognitive load through seamless integration into existing workflows and by providing context-aware suggestions

requirement: The system shall provide deep contextual awareness and transparency in the reasoning behind code suggestions.
exact_text_quote: Tools that integrate deep contextual awareness and provide transparency in the reasoning behind code suggestions are particularly valued for reducing uncertainty and fostering appropriate trust

requirement: The system shall provide easily reversible overrides to ensure users maintain control over code generation.
exact_text_quote: Integrated verification features, such as auto-generated tests or security scans, and easily reversible overrides give developers continuous oversight and help ensure high-quality code outcomes

requirement: The system shall increase task completion rates for data analysis coding tasks.
exact_text_quote: We find that ACATs increase task completion rates, resulting in a general reduction in task completion time.

requirement: The system shall enhance code quality for data analysis source code.
exact_text_quote: ACATs can enhance code quality, with GitHub Copilot demonstrating the most outstanding performance.

requirement: The system shall improve users' self-perceived productivity when writing data analysis code.
exact_text_quote: For the majority of participants, ACATs do reduce the perceived task difficulty, improve participants' self-performance, reduce the times of seeking external help, and generally improve the participants' programming experience.

requirement: The system shall provide code recommendations with correct syntax.
exact_text_quote: Among the factors expressed by the participants, 'correct syntax' and 'similarity to correct code' stand out as the most crucial factors, with over 97% of participants emphasizing their (extreme) importance.

requirement: The system shall generate code recommendations that are similar to correct code for the intended data analysis task.
exact_text_quote: 'similarity to correct code' ensures that the generated code aligns with the intended functionality and logic of the program.

requirement: The system shall provide readable code recommendations for data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: 'Readability' is another key concern, with 88% of participants deeming it as (very) important.

requirement: The system shall support multiple code completion scenarios including identifiers, keywords, and multi-line completions.
exact_text_quote: Other factors such as 'consistent code style', 'supporting for multiple scenarios (e.g., identifiers, keywords, and multi-line completions)', and 'including comments' are all matter of concern for over 70% of participants.

requirement: The system shall improve acceptance rates for comments and string completion in data analysis code.
exact_text_quote: the two types with the lowest acceptance rates are 'comments completion' and 'string completion'.

requirement: The system shall adapt code recommendation length based on the type of data analysis task.
exact_text_quote: Task type influences the length of accepted code, with 'Management System Development' tasks having longer snippets.

requirement: The system shall provide accurate code autocompletion for data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: 3. Improved accuracy of code autocompletion (7)

requirement: The system shall provide accurate debug functionality for data analysis code.
exact_text_quote: Seven participants further hope to enhance the 'accuracy of debug functionality'.

requirement: The system shall optimize the ranking of code suggestions to present the most relevant recommendations first.
exact_text_quote: The second expectation centers on 'optimized ranking of code suggestions', with three participants also expressing a desire to refine the UI and selection of multiple suggestions.

requirement: The system shall adaptively learn the user's personal coding style for data analysis.
exact_text_quote: 9. Adaptive learning of personal coding style (2)

requirement: The system shall generate frameworks based on natural language requirements for data analysis projects.
exact_text_quote: Five participants express the hope that ACATs can directly generate frameworks based on natural language, particularly during the initial stages of development.

requirement: The system shall generate project-level code for data analysis applications.
exact_text_quote: Another similar expectation is 'capability to generate project-level code'.

requirement: The system shall improve natural language understanding and interaction capabilities.
exact_text_quote: Participants express ten expectations about enhancements to current features, with over half emphasizing the desire to enhance natural language understanding and interaction capabilities.

requirement: The system shall better understand user intent when providing code recommendations for data analysis.
exact_text_quote: 8. Enhanced understanding of user Intent (2)

requirement: The system shall provide fast code completion response times.
exact_text_quote: In terms of response speed, they desire faster code completion and NL2Code responses.

requirement: The system shall support local connectivity to minimize network dependency for data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: Regarding accessibility, they hope that ACATs can support local connections, minimizing the impact of network quality on their usage.

requirement: The system shall provide user-friendly documentation and easily visible support functions.
exact_text_quote: Lastly, for system/UI design, participants want user support and auxiliary functions to be easily visible and accessible.

requirement: The system shall offer cost-effective pricing for data scientist and natural scientist users.
exact_text_quote: Cost is another factor, with participants favoring more affordable solutions.

requirement: The system shall handle complex logic in data analysis tasks effectively.
exact_text_quote: Functional challenges revolve around code completion, especially ACATs' 'poor performance on tasks with complex logic (mentioned by 44% of participants).

requirement: The system shall provide code autocompletion functionality that predicts and completes code snippets to reduce repetitive coding tasks, minimize syntax errors, and speed up development time.
exact_text_quote: Using Copilot functionality that predicts and completes code snippets, reducing repetitive coding tasks, minimizing syntax errors, and speeding up development time

requirement: The system shall generate new source code based on user prompts for data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: Using prompts to have Copilot generate brand new code

requirement: The system shall generate unit tests for provided source code.
exact_text_quote: Generation of unit tests for source code

requirement: The system shall provide explanations, summaries, and walkthroughs of existing code to support onboarding and knowledge transfer.
exact_text_quote: Providing summary, explanation, and walkthroughs of existing proprietary code, facilitating easier onboarding and knowledge transfer among team members

requirement: The system shall assist with debugging and fixing code issues.
exact_text_quote: Help debugging and fixing customer issues

requirement: The system shall assist with code refactoring to improve readability.
exact_text_quote: Refactoring existing code for readability

requirement: The system shall generate documentation for methods and functions.
exact_text_quote: Creating and maintaining clear, comprehensive, and up-to-date documentation for methods and functions

requirement: The system shall generate CI/CD pipeline configurations.
exact_text_quote: Development of Continuous Integration and Continuous Delivery pipelines that automate the testing and deployment process

requirement: The system shall assist in fixing compilation and linter errors.
exact_text_quote: Addressing and resolving syntax errors and warnings identified during compilation and by linting tools

requirement: The system shall generate component tests, integration tests, and monitors.
exact_text_quote: Generation of component tests, integration tests, and monitors

requirement: The system shall function as a pair programming assistant to answer questions about functions and syntax without requiring context switching to external sources.
exact_text_quote: Using CoPilot as a pair programmer to ask questions and get help with functions and syntax in the IDE without switching to external sources like API specs, Google or Stack Overflow, etc.

requirement: The system shall perform better with JavaScript, Java, Python, and Golang compared to C/C++ for data analysis code generation tasks.
exact_text_quote: Copilot performed best with JavaScript, showing time savings of close to 50%, with Java a close second at around 45%. Golang, Python and various scripting languages and configuration file updates had similar time savings of between 37% and 33%. With C and C++, coplot often failed to generate useful code

requirement: The system shall achieve higher efficiency on repetitive tasks and boilerplate code generation compared to complex custom algorithms.
exact_text_quote: Copilot does very well in saving toil related to repetitive tasks, reducing the time spent there by as much as 60%. It also does well with code generation or update when the function context is small, as well as with generating boilerplate code

requirement: The system shall require detailed prompting and context to optimize generated code quality.
exact_text_quote: Code quality could be variable, detailed prompting often helped, and a thorough review was always needed before accepting generated code

requirement: The system shall produce better quality code when provided with context from files containing similar patterns and descriptive function and variable names.
exact_text_quote: Code quality was better if the code provided as context was of good quality, and especially if function and variable names used in the existing code were descriptive

requirement: The system shall reduce coding time by approximately 35% compared to baseline for suitable tasks.
exact_text_quote: On average, the use of GitHub Copilot was observed to reduce coding time by around 35% compared to the baseline

requirement: The system shall have limited utility for complex tasks requiring understanding of large local context or modifications across multiple files.
exact_text_quote: The area where it does not do well is with more complex coding tasks, especially ones that involve understanding a large local context, whether that is a large function in a single file, or code spread out across many files

requirement: The system shall require careful review for security and code quality before accepting generated code.
exact_text_quote: Careful review and the use of other complementary tools such as static analysis and vulnerability analysis tools is currently recommended to ensure the quality and appropriateness of the generated code

requirement: The system shall generate code with variable quality that may include unoptimized code or subtle errors requiring domain expert attention.
exact_text_quote: More subtle errors such as missing error checks, unoptimized code or insecure code require more careful attention, and familiarity with the programming language and the domain

requirement: The system shall provide code recommendations for the next step in a data science workflow to help data scientists complete their tasks.
exact_text_quote: an AI-based coding assistant that provides explicit alternatives as recommendations throughout the data science workflow

requirement: The system shall generate alternative code recommendations that offer different methods to solve a data science task.
exact_text_quote: requests a new recommendation for the prompt input and explicitly requests its alternatives

requirement: The system shall allow users to specify the data science workflow step (e.g., data exploration, modelling, evaluation) in the prompt to receive more relevant recommendations.
exact_text_quote: including the data science step in a prompt had a statistically significant improvement in the acceptance of recommendations

requirement: The system shall integrate with computational notebook environments (e.g., Jupyter) to provide code recommendations within the data scientist's workflow.
exact_text_quote: we conduct our study in a computational notebook (Jupyter) environment, given its popularity among data scientists

requirement: The system shall provide recommendations for both descriptive data science tasks (summarising, exploring, visualising data) and predictive tasks (making predictions using learning algorithms).
exact_text_quote: A descriptive task summarises, explores, or visualises the data collected to, for example, find patterns. A predictive task uses methods like learning algorithms to make predictions on future data by inferring insights from past data.

requirement: The system shall allow users to accept, reject, edit, or save code recommendations before integrating them into their notebook.
exact_text_quote: The user can interact with the code recommendation using the following actions: accept the recommendation, reject the recommendation, edit the recommendation, and save the recommendation for later use.

requirement: The system shall provide context from previous notebook cells to generate relevant code recommendations.
exact_text_quote: previous cells: previous cells (including code and markdown cells) that are considered to provide context for the next code recommendation

requirement: The system shall generate code recommendations that are acceptable to users, measured by user acceptance decisions.
exact_text_quote: acceptance of the recommendation, measured through user's accept — explicit or implicit — decision for a recommendation by the AI

requirement: The system shall generate code recommendations that help users successfully complete data science tasks, measured by task performance scores.
exact_text_quote: performance of the recommendation, measured by the score assigned to the tasks. The score is determined using an answer key and a scoring mechanism that evaluates the correctness of the final solutions submitted for each task.

requirement: The system shall support prompting with additional natural language instructions to guide the recommendation generation.
exact_text_quote: additional instructions: users can add natural language text to provide more instructions to the assistant.

requirement: The system should provide alternative recommendations that help users explore different analytical paths in data science tasks.
exact_text_quote: recommending the data scientists with alternative paths could be helpful

requirement: The system shall present code recommendations through a side-panel interface in computational notebooks.
exact_text_quote: CATSci uses the side-panel space that mimics a code cell to show the recommended code

requirement: The system shall generate code as an intermediary to process massive data and visualize its results based on human requests.
exact_text_quote: it receives human requests and generates code as an intermediary to process massive data and visualize its results

requirement: The system shall autonomously explore data sources to discover potential human requests from data schemas and seed requests.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot discovers potential requests and a broader range of human need from data. It involves a 'self-exploration' process to generate massive requests based on all data schemas and seed requests.

requirement: The system shall design universal interface modules from synthesized requests with automatic test case generation.
exact_text_quote: It designs modular interface from synthesized requests, with test cases automatically generated for verification.

requirement: The system shall autonomously test interface correctness based on compiler feedback.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot autonomously tests its correctness based on compiler feedback.

requirement: The system shall optimize interfaces by merging similar interfaces to improve generality.
exact_text_quote: To optimize the generality of designed interfaces, Data-Copilot also merges similar interfaces.

requirement: The system shall invoke pre-designed interfaces to address real-time user requests.
exact_text_quote: For real-time requests, Data-Copilot invokes these interfaces to address user intent.

requirement: The system shall generate hybrid workflows combining interfaces and raw code for uncovered requests.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot adopts an interface-code hybrid generation strategy. Specifically, it prioritizes invoking existing interfaces to resolve user requests.

requirement: The system shall organize interfaces in a hierarchical structure for efficient retrieval based on task types and operation types.
exact_text_quote: we organize all designed interfaces in a hierarchical structure. Each interface is grouped into different tasks (stock task, fund task, etc.) and different operation types (data acquisition, processing, visualization, etc.)

requirement: The system shall plan interface workflows with specific structures including sequential, parallel, or loop configurations.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot plans workflows—multiple interfaces in specific order forming chain, parallel, or loop structures.

requirement: The system shall achieve high accuracy in addressing human requests for data analysis.
exact_text_quote: Quantitative evaluations indicate our exploration-deployment strategy addresses human requests more accurate and efficiently

requirement: The system shall reduce token consumption by invoking pre-designed interfaces instead of generating complete code for each request.
exact_text_quote: Data-Copilot can save 70% of token consumption since its output only contains interface names and arguments.

requirement: The system shall reduce errors in real-time responses through pre-validated interface modules.
exact_text_quote: invoking these pre-designed and well-validated interfaces can significantly reduce errors during real-time requests

requirement: The system shall provide interpretability through step-by-step interface workflow summaries.
exact_text_quote: compared to lengthy code, these interfaces provide greater interpretability, since it is easier for human reading and interaction

requirement: The system shall handle large-scale data analysis tasks efficiently.
exact_text_quote: achieving automated large-scale data analysis

requirement: The system shall generate source code for data analysis tasks including data cleaning, preprocessing, model training, and result interpretation.
exact_text_quote: by leveraging the power of ChatGPT, data scientists can automate various aspects of their workflow, such as data cleaning and preprocessing, model training, and result interpretation

requirement: The system shall provide explanations and examples of programming concepts including syntax, data structures, and algorithms.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT can be helpful by providing explanations and examples of programming concepts, such as syntax, data structures, algorithms, and more

requirement: The system shall enable users without prior programming experience to create workable code for data analysis.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT enables those who have never programmed before to create workable code

requirement: The system shall provide guidance on specific programming languages and tools used in data science such as Python, R, and version control systems.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT can also be used to provide guidance on specific programming languages and tools, such as Python, Java, or Git

requirement: The system shall assist in solving coding challenges and debugging code for data analysis programs.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT can assist in solving coding challenges and debugging code

requirement: The system shall generate synthetic data to address data scarcity issues in machine learning applications.
exact_text_quote: its ability to generate synthetic data also makes it a valuable resource for data scientists who are working with limited or incomplete datasets

requirement: The system shall provide code examples for creating interactive data analysis applications.
exact_text_quote: This simple app demonstrates the ease with which interactive web applications can be created using Shiny, with the guidance of ChatGPT

requirement: The system shall generate coherent and contextually appropriate code that is relevant to the data analysis task.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT can generate text that is coherent, contextually relevant, and mimics human language

requirement: The system shall be fine-tunable for specific data science use cases and language-related tasks.
exact_text_quote: One of the key advantages of ChatGPT is its ability to be fine-tuned for a wide range of language-related tasks

requirement: The system shall provide code completion suggestions within an integrated development environment (IDE) to assist developers in writing source code.
exact_text_quote: Code-completion systems offering suggestions to a developer in their integrated development environment (IDE) have become the most frequently used kind of programmer assistance.

requirement: The system shall use a large language model (LLM) to predict code completions from the context of what the user is working on.
exact_text_quote: When generating whole snippets of code, they typically use a large language model (LLM) to predict what the user might type next (the completion) from the context of what they are working on at the moment (the prompt).

requirement: The system shall generate multi-line code completions at arbitrary positions in the code.
exact_text_quote: This system allows for completions at any position in the code, often spanning multiple lines at once.

requirement: The system shall track the acceptance rate of shown suggestions as a measure of system contribution.
exact_text_quote: We define acceptance rate as the fraction of completions shown to the developer that are subsequently accepted for inclusion in the source file.

requirement: The system shall track the persistence of accepted completions in source code over time to measure sustained impact.
exact_text_quote: The intuition here is that a completion which is accepted into the source file but then subsequently turns out to be incorrect can be considered to have wasted developer time both in reviewing it and then having to go back and delete it.

requirement: The system shall support developers of all skill levels, with junior developers receiving the largest productivity gains.
exact_text_quote: AI pair-programming tools such as GitHub Copilot have a big impact on developer productivity. This holds for developers of all skill levels, with junior developers seeing the largest gains.

requirement: The system shall improve developer productivity across multiple dimensions including task time, product quality, cognitive load, enjoyment, and learning.
exact_text_quote: The reported benefits of receiving AI suggestions while coding span the full range of typically investigated aspects of productivity, such as task time, product quality, cognitive load, enjoyment, and learning.

requirement: The system shall provide suggestions that are useful as a starting point for further development rather than requiring perfect correctness.
exact_text_quote: While suggestion correctness is important, the driving factor for these improvements appears to be not correctness as such, but whether the suggestions are useful as a starting point for further development.

requirement: The system shall serve as a useful template that developers can modify, where partially edited completions still represent positive contributions.
exact_text_quote: We also record mostly unchanged completions: A large completion requiring a few edits might still be a positive contribution.

requirement: The system shall help users make progress toward their coding goals rather than merely saving keystrokes.
exact_text_quote: Coding is not typing, and GitHub Copilot's central value lies not in being the way the user enters most of their code. Instead, it lies in helping the user to make the best progress toward their goals.

requirement: The acceptance rate of shown suggestions shall be monitored as it correlates with perceived productivity.
exact_text_quote: We find acceptance rate (accepted_per_shown) most positively predicts users' perception of productivity, although, given the confounding and human factors, there is still notable unexplained variance.

requirement: The system shall generate boilerplate code tailored to user specifications for data analysis projects.
exact_text_quote: Both back-end and front-end developers used ChatGPT to create tailored boilerplate code

requirement: The system shall refactor and simplify existing source code for data analysis.
exact_text_quote: GenAI was used on many different tasks, ranging from refactoring or simplifying code

requirement: The system shall translate source code from one programming language to another.
exact_text_quote: translating code from one programming language to another

requirement: The system shall explain existing source code to users in natural language.
exact_text_quote: simply explaining the code

requirement: The system shall generate test cases and unit tests for data analysis source code, including scenarios the user may not have considered.
exact_text_quote: the generated tests sometimes accounted for scenarios and test cases that they themselves had not thought of

requirement: The system shall provide code review feedback on source code.
exact_text_quote: code review

requirement: The system shall support interactive learning by acting as a personal tutor that answers questions about programming and data analysis concepts.
exact_text_quote: it's like having a personal tutor. Where you can ask yourself questions

requirement: The system shall simulate virtual environments to help users understand domain contexts for their data analysis tasks.
exact_text_quote: They engaged with ChatGPT and asked it to simulate that it was a stock exchange

requirement: The system shall integrate with development environments to provide seamless code assistance.
exact_text_quote: the integration in the IDE meant that the code could be autocompleted and explained by ChatGPT in a seamless process

requirement: The system shall reduce the time users spend on repetitive and tedious coding tasks.
exact_text_quote: By spending less time on manual and repetitive tasks, the improved productivity brought more enjoyment, motivation, and fun to the work

requirement: The system shall provide immediate responses to user queries to maintain workflow efficiency.
exact_text_quote: ChatGPT responds immediately with the, assumed, correct answer to the question

requirement: The system shall support prompt engineering techniques to improve response quality and precision.
exact_text_quote: the quality of their prompt affected the quality of the response and how the use of prompt engineering techniques like contextualizing the problem, using personas, etc. guide and steer the dialogue with ChatGPT

requirement: The system shall adapt code assistants to computational notebooks to support data scientists in their data analysis workflows.
exact_text_quote: All participants believed it is valuable to adapt code assistants to notebooks.

requirement: The system shall automatically consider all available notebook information for code generation without requiring manual context specification.
exact_text_quote: They generally preferred not to manually specify context, trusting the system to consider all available information.

requirement: The system shall present disambiguation options showing both code and output effects together to enable comprehensive evaluation of suggestions.
exact_text_quote: For disambiguation, participants favored designs showing both code and output effects together, allowing them to evaluate suggestions comprehensively.

requirement: The system shall provide linter-style interfaces that highlight semantic issues in generated code for adaptation support.
exact_text_quote: Regarding code adaptation, they appreciated linter-style interfaces highlighting semantic issues, though opinions varied on other approaches.
